---
title: "SpliceAI Validation Plots - Position and Score Analysis"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.width = 16, fig.height = 12)
```

## Load Libraries

```{r libraries}
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(pheatmap)
library(viridis)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)
library(GenomicRanges)
```

## QC: Validate BED File Coordinates

```{r qc-bed-coordinates}
# Read the BED file
bed_data <- fread("/home/mikej10/advbfx/intronretention/hnRNPH1_IR_MAF/data/DecoysInConservedGenes50thpercentilev2.bed", 
                  sep = "\t", 
                  header = FALSE,
                  col.names = c("chr", "start", "end", "id", "score", "strand"))

cat("BED file loaded:\n")
cat("  Total records:", nrow(bed_data), "\n")

# Extract coordinate after underscore from column 4 (id)
bed_data$coord_from_id <- as.integer(str_extract(bed_data$id, "(?<=_)\\d+$"))

# Check for any missing coordinates
missing_coords <- sum(is.na(bed_data$coord_from_id))
if (missing_coords > 0) {
  cat("  WARNING: ", missing_coords, " records have missing coordinates in ID\n")
}

# Create GenomicRanges object for the BED intervals
bed_gr <- GRanges(
  seqnames = bed_data$chr,
  ranges = IRanges(start = bed_data$start, end = bed_data$end),
  strand = bed_data$strand,
  id = bed_data$id,
  coord_from_id = bed_data$coord_from_id
)

# Check if coordinate from ID falls within the start-end range
bed_data$coord_in_range <- bed_data$coord_from_id >= bed_data$start & 
                           bed_data$coord_from_id <= bed_data$end

# Summary statistics
total_records <- nrow(bed_data)
valid_records <- sum(bed_data$coord_in_range, na.rm = TRUE)
invalid_records <- total_records - valid_records

cat("\nCoordinate Validation Results:\n")
cat("  Total records:", total_records, "\n")
cat("  Valid (coordinate in range):", valid_records, 
    sprintf("(%.2f%%)\n", 100 * valid_records / total_records))
cat("  Invalid (coordinate outside range):", invalid_records,
    sprintf("(%.2f%%)\n", 100 * invalid_records / total_records))

# Show examples of invalid records if any
if (invalid_records > 0) {
  invalid_data <- bed_data[!bed_data$coord_in_range, ]
  cat("\n  Examples of invalid records (first 10):\n")
  print(head(invalid_data[, .(chr, start, end, id, coord_from_id)], 10))
  
  # Calculate distance from range for invalid records
  invalid_data$dist_from_start <- invalid_data$coord_from_id - invalid_data$start
  invalid_data$dist_from_end <- invalid_data$coord_from_id - invalid_data$end
  
  cat("\n  Distance statistics for invalid records:\n")
  cat("    Min distance from start:", min(invalid_data$dist_from_start, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
  cat("    Max distance from start:", max(invalid_data$dist_from_start, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
  cat("    Min distance from end:", min(invalid_data$dist_from_end, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
  cat("    Max distance from end:", max(invalid_data$dist_from_end, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
} else {
  cat("\n  ✓ All coordinates are within their respective ranges - PASSED\n")
}
```

## Load and Parse Data

```{r load-data}
# Read the TSV file
spliceai_data <- fread("/home/mikej10/advbfx/intronretention/hnRNPH1_IR_MAF/results/splice_out_v2.3/all_spliceai_scores_v2.3.tsv", sep = "\t", header = TRUE)

cat("Dataset loaded:\n")
cat("  Number of decoy IDs:", nrow(spliceai_data), "\n")
cat("  Number of species columns:", ncol(spliceai_data) - 1, "\n")

# Function to parse [max1][pos1][max2][pos2] format
parse_score_format <- function(value) {
  # Match pattern: [number][number][number][number]
  match_result <- str_match(value, "\\[([\\d.-]+)\\]\\[(\\d+)\\]\\[([\\d.-]+)\\]\\[(\\d+)\\]")
  if (is.na(match_result[1])) {
    return(list(max1 = NA, pos1 = NA, max2 = NA, pos2 = NA))
  }
  return(list(
    max1 = as.numeric(match_result[2]),
    pos1 = as.integer(match_result[3]),
    max2 = as.numeric(match_result[4]),
    pos2 = as.integer(match_result[5])
  ))
}

# Extract decoy IDs
decoy_ids <- spliceai_data$decoyID

# Get species columns (all except decoyID)
species_cols <- setdiff(names(spliceai_data), "decoyID")

cat("\nParsing score data for all species...\n")

# Parse all data into long format
parsed_data_list <- list()

for (species in species_cols) {
  parsed_scores <- lapply(spliceai_data[[species]], parse_score_format)
  
  # Convert to data.table
  species_data <- data.table(
    decoyID = decoy_ids,
    species = species,
    max1 = sapply(parsed_scores, function(x) x$max1),
    pos1 = sapply(parsed_scores, function(x) x$pos1),
    max2 = sapply(parsed_scores, function(x) x$max2),
    pos2 = sapply(parsed_scores, function(x) x$pos2)
  )
  
  parsed_data_list[[species]] <- species_data
}

# Combine all species data
all_data <- rbindlist(parsed_data_list)

# Filter out -1 values for analysis
all_data_valid <- all_data[max1 != -1.0 & pos1 != -1 & max2 != -1.0 & pos2 != -1]

cat("\nData parsing complete:\n")
cat("  Total data points:", nrow(all_data), "\n")
cat("  Valid data points (excluding -1):", nrow(all_data_valid), "\n")
cat("  Unique decoy IDs:", length(unique(all_data_valid$decoyID)), "\n")
cat("  Unique species:", length(unique(all_data_valid$species)), "\n")
```

## 1. Histogram: Position Comparison (pos1 vs pos2)

```{r histogram-pos1-pos2}
# Create histogram comparing pos1 and pos2
pos_data_long <- all_data_valid %>%
  select(decoyID, species, pos1, pos2) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(pos1, pos2), 
               names_to = "position_type", 
               values_to = "position") %>%
  filter(!is.na(position))

p_hist_pos <- ggplot(pos_data_long, aes(x = position, fill = position_type)) +
  geom_histogram(alpha = 0.6, bins = 100, position = "identity") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("pos1" = "steelblue", "pos2" = "salmon"),
                    labels = c("pos1", "pos2"),
                    name = "Position Type") +
  scale_x_log10() +
  labs(title = "Distribution of pos1 and pos2 Values (Log Scale)",
       subtitle = "Comparison of canonical splice site position (pos1) vs secondary position (pos2)",
       x = "Position (nucleotides from sequence start, log10 scale)",
       y = "Frequency",
       caption = paste("Total data points:", nrow(pos_data_long))) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.position = "right") +
  # Add vertical line at position 50 (expected canonical splice site)
  geom_vline(xintercept = 50, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("text", x = 50, y = Inf, label = "Expected pos1 (~50)", 
           vjust = 1.5, hjust = 0, color = "red", fontface = "bold")

print(p_hist_pos)

# Summary statistics
cat("\nPosition Summary Statistics:\n")
cat("  pos1 - Mean:", mean(all_data_valid$pos1, na.rm = TRUE), 
    "| Median:", median(all_data_valid$pos1, na.rm = TRUE), 
    "| % < 55:", round(100 * sum(all_data_valid$pos1 < 55, na.rm = TRUE) / nrow(all_data_valid), 2), "%\n")
cat("  pos2 - Mean:", mean(all_data_valid$pos2, na.rm = TRUE), 
    "| Median:", median(all_data_valid$pos2, na.rm = TRUE),
    "| % < 55:", round(100 * sum(all_data_valid$pos2 < 55, na.rm = TRUE) / nrow(all_data_valid), 2), "%\n")
```

## 2. Scatterplot: max2 > max1 Cases (max2 vs pos2)

```{r scatterplot-max2-gt-max1}
# Filter for cases where max2 > max1
max2_gt_max1_data <- all_data_valid %>%
  filter(max2 > max1) %>%
  filter(!is.na(max2) & !is.na(pos2))

cat("\nCases where max2 > max1:\n")
cat("  Total cases:", nrow(max2_gt_max1_data), "\n")
cat("  Percentage of all valid data:", 
    round(100 * nrow(max2_gt_max1_data) / nrow(all_data_valid), 2), "%\n")

p_scatter_max2 <- ggplot(max2_gt_max1_data, aes(x = pos2, y = max2)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.5, color = "darkgreen") +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, color = "red", linewidth = 1.5) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  labs(title = "Scatterplot: max2 vs pos2 (when max2 > max1, Log Scale)",
       subtitle = paste("Cases where secondary score exceeds primary score (n =", 
                       format(nrow(max2_gt_max1_data), big.mark = ","), ")"),
       x = "pos2 (position of max2, log10 scale)",
       y = "max2 (SpliceAI score)",
       caption = "Red line shows LOESS smoothing trend") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  # Add reference lines
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.1, linetype = "dashed", color = "blue", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "blue", alpha = 0.5) +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = 0.1, label = "max2 = 0.1", 
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = -0.5, color = "blue", size = 3) +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = 0.5, label = "max2 = 0.5", 
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = -0.5, color = "blue", size = 3)

print(p_scatter_max2)
```

## 3. Density Plots (Bell Curves) for All Four Statistics

```{r density-plots-all-stats}
# Prepare data for density plots
density_data <- all_data_valid %>%
  select(max1, pos1, max2, pos2) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), 
               names_to = "statistic", 
               values_to = "value") %>%
  filter(!is.na(value))

# Create separate plots for pos1/pos2 with log scale and max1/max2 without log scale
density_data_pos <- density_data %>% filter(statistic %in% c("pos1", "pos2"))
density_data_score <- density_data %>% filter(statistic %in% c("max1", "max2"))

p_density_pos <- ggplot(density_data_pos, aes(x = value, fill = statistic)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6, linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ statistic, scales = "free", ncol = 2,
             labeller = labeller(statistic = c(
               "pos1" = "pos1 (Position of max1, Log Scale)",
               "pos2" = "pos2 (Position of max2, Log Scale)"
             ))) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "plasma", name = "Statistic") +
  scale_x_log10() +
  labs(title = "Distribution (Density) of Position Statistics (Log Scale)",
       subtitle = "Bell curves showing the distribution of pos1 and pos2",
       x = "Value (log10 scale)",
       y = "Density") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "none")

p_density_score <- ggplot(density_data_score, aes(x = value, fill = statistic)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6, linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ statistic, scales = "free", ncol = 2,
             labeller = labeller(statistic = c(
               "max1" = "max1 (Primary SpliceAI Score)",
               "max2" = "max2 (Secondary SpliceAI Score)"
             ))) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "plasma", name = "Statistic") +
  labs(title = "Distribution (Density) of Score Statistics",
       subtitle = "Bell curves showing the distribution of max1 and max2",
       x = "Value",
       y = "Density") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "none")

print(p_density_pos)
print(p_density_score)

# Summary statistics for each
cat("\nSummary Statistics by Statistic:\n")
for (stat in c("max1", "pos1", "max2", "pos2")) {
  stat_data <- density_data %>% filter(statistic == stat)
  cat(sprintf("  %s: Mean = %.3f, Median = %.3f, SD = %.3f, Range = [%.3f, %.3f]\n",
              stat,
              mean(stat_data$value, na.rm = TRUE),
              median(stat_data$value, na.rm = TRUE),
              sd(stat_data$value, na.rm = TRUE),
              min(stat_data$value, na.rm = TRUE),
              max(stat_data$value, na.rm = TRUE)))
}
```

## 4. Heatmap of max2 Values

```{r heatmap-max2}
# Load species order from spliceai_heatmap.Rmd approach
# Read species order and mapping
species_order_file <- fread("/home/mikej10/advbfx/intronretention/hnRNPH1_IR_MAF/data/Newickspeciesorder.txt", header = FALSE, col.names = "tree_name")
species_mapping <- fread("/home/mikej10/advbfx/intronretention/hnRNPH1_IR_MAF/results/tree_to_clade_mapping.tsv", sep = "\t", header = TRUE)
ordered_species <- merge(species_order_file, species_mapping, by = "tree_name", all.x = TRUE, sort = FALSE)
ordered_species_ids <- ordered_species$species_id[!is.na(ordered_species$species_id)]

# Map species IDs to common names
species_id_to_common <- setNames(species_mapping$matched_common_name, species_mapping$species_id)

# Prepare matrix for heatmap: decoy IDs as columns, species as rows
# Extract max2 values for each decoy-species pair
max2_matrix_data <- all_data_valid %>%
  select(decoyID, species, max2) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = decoyID, values_from = max2)

# Set species as row names and convert to matrix
max2_matrix <- as.matrix(max2_matrix_data[, -1])  # Exclude species column
rownames(max2_matrix) <- max2_matrix_data$species

# Replace NA with -1 for visualization (missing data)
max2_matrix[is.na(max2_matrix)] <- -1

# Reorder rows (species) to match Newick order from spliceai_heatmap.Rmd
# First, match available species to ordered list
available_species <- rownames(max2_matrix)
ordered_available <- intersect(ordered_species_ids, available_species)
# Add any species not in ordered list at the end
other_species <- setdiff(available_species, ordered_available)
final_species_order <- c(ordered_available, other_species)
max2_matrix <- max2_matrix[final_species_order, , drop = FALSE]

# Map species IDs to common names for row labels
current_rownames <- rownames(max2_matrix)
common_names <- ifelse(current_rownames %in% names(species_id_to_common),
  species_id_to_common[current_rownames],
  current_rownames
)
rownames(max2_matrix) <- common_names

cat("\nMax2 Heatmap Matrix:\n")
cat("  Dimensions:", dim(max2_matrix), "\n")
cat("  Species (rows):", nrow(max2_matrix), "\n")
cat("  Decoy IDs (columns):", ncol(max2_matrix), "\n")
cat("  Value range:", min(max2_matrix), "to", max(max2_matrix), "\n")
cat("  -1 values (missing):", sum(max2_matrix == -1), "\n")

# Create color palette: grey for -1, viridis for 0-1
n_colors <- 100
color_gradient <- c("grey70", viridis(n_colors))

# Create heatmap with species in Newick order (no row clustering)
# Plot full matrix - no sampling
pheatmap(
  max2_matrix,
  color = color_gradient,
  breaks = c(-1.5, seq(-0.5, 1, length.out = n_colors + 1)),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,  # Keep species in Newick order
  cluster_cols = TRUE,
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  show_colnames = FALSE,  # Too many decoy IDs to show
  main = "Heatmap of max2 (Secondary SpliceAI Scores) - Species Ordered by Newick Tree",
  fontsize_row = 8,
  fontsize_col = 6,
  border_color = NA,
  na_col = "grey70",
  legend_breaks = c(-1, 0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1),
  legend_labels = c("Missing", "0.0", "0.25", "0.5", "0.75", "1.0")
)
```

## 5. Additional Analysis: pos1 Distribution by Decile

```{r pos1-decile-analysis}
# Analyze pos1 distribution to check for canonical splice site detection
pos1_analysis <- all_data_valid %>%
  filter(!is.na(pos1)) %>%
  mutate(
    pos1_bin = cut(pos1, breaks = c(0, 30, 40, 50, 60, 70, 100, 200, Inf),
                   labels = c("0-30", "31-40", "41-50", "51-60", "61-70", "71-100", "101-200", "200+"))
  )

p_pos1_bins <- ggplot(pos1_analysis, aes(x = pos1_bin, fill = pos1_bin)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "count", alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "plasma") +
  labs(title = "Distribution of pos1 Values by Position Bins",
       subtitle = "Checking if canonical splice sites cluster around position 50",
       x = "Position Bin (nucleotides)",
       y = "Count",
       caption = paste("Expected canonical splice site position: ~50 nt")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "none") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 3.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("text", x = 3.5, y = Inf, label = "Expected range\n(41-60)", 
           vjust = 1.5, hjust = 0.5, color = "red", fontface = "bold")

print(p_pos1_bins)

# Summary by bin
cat("\npos1 Distribution by Bin:\n")
pos1_summary <- pos1_analysis %>%
  count(pos1_bin) %>%
  mutate(percentage = round(100 * n / sum(n), 2))
print(pos1_summary)
```

## 6. Summary: Validation of Canonical Splice Site Detection

```{r validation-summary}
cat("\n")
cat(paste0(rep("=", 80), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("VALIDATION SUMMARY: Canonical Splice Site Detection\n")
cat(paste0(rep("=", 80), collapse = ""), "\n\n")

# Key metrics
total_valid <- nrow(all_data_valid)
pos1_near_50 <- sum(all_data_valid$pos1 >= 40 & all_data_valid$pos1 <= 60, na.rm = TRUE)
pos1_lt_55 <- sum(all_data_valid$pos1 < 55, na.rm = TRUE)
pos2_lt_55 <- sum(all_data_valid$pos2 < 55, na.rm = TRUE)
max1_high <- sum(all_data_valid$max1 > 0.8, na.rm = TRUE)
max2_gt_max1 <- sum(all_data_valid$max2 > all_data_valid$max1, na.rm = TRUE)

cat("Key Validation Metrics:\n")
cat(sprintf("  1. pos1 in expected range (40-60 nt): %d (%.2f%%)\n", 
            pos1_near_50, 100 * pos1_near_50 / total_valid))
cat(sprintf("  2. pos1 < 55 nt: %d (%.2f%%)\n", 
            pos1_lt_55, 100 * pos1_lt_55 / total_valid))
cat(sprintf("  3. pos2 < 55 nt: %d (%.2f%%)\n", 
            pos2_lt_55, 100 * pos2_lt_55 / total_valid))
cat(sprintf("  4. max1 > 0.8 (high confidence): %d (%.2f%%)\n", 
            max1_high, 100 * max1_high / total_valid))
cat(sprintf("  5. max2 > max1 (secondary site stronger): %d (%.2f%%)\n", 
            max2_gt_max1, 100 * max2_gt_max1 / total_valid))
cat(sprintf("  6. Mean pos1: %.2f nt (expected ~50 nt)\n", 
            mean(all_data_valid$pos1, na.rm = TRUE)))
cat(sprintf("  7. Median pos1: %.2f nt\n", 
            median(all_data_valid$pos1, na.rm = TRUE)))

cat("\nInterpretation:\n")
if (mean(all_data_valid$pos1, na.rm = TRUE) > 40 && mean(all_data_valid$pos1, na.rm = TRUE) < 60) {
  cat("  ✓ Mean pos1 is in expected range (40-60 nt) - GOOD\n")
} else {
  cat("  ⚠ Mean pos1 is outside expected range - may indicate issues with large insertions\n")
}

if (100 * pos1_lt_55 / total_valid > 80) {
  cat("  ✓ >80% of pos1 values are < 55 nt - GOOD\n")
} else {
  cat("  ⚠ <80% of pos1 values are < 55 nt - may indicate detection issues\n")
}

cat("\n", paste0(rep("=", 80), collapse = ""), "\n")
```

## 7. Create Filtered Datasets

```{r create-filtered-datasets}
# Create filtered datasets based on criteria

# max2 > 0.8
filtered_clean <- all_data_valid %>%
  filter(max2 < 0.8)

cat("\nFiltered Dataset Summary:\n")
cat("max2 <= 0.8):", nrow(filtered_clean), 
    sprintf("(%.2f%%)\n", 100 * nrow(filtered_clean) / nrow(all_data_valid)))
```

## 8. Re-run Analysis with Filtered Dataset (No Log Scale)

```{r filtered-histogram-pos1-pos2}
# Histogram comparing pos1 and pos2 (NO LOG SCALE)
pos_data_long_filtered <- filtered_clean %>%
  select(decoyID, species, pos1, pos2) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(pos1, pos2), 
               names_to = "position_type", 
               values_to = "position") %>%
  filter(!is.na(position))

p_hist_pos_filtered <- ggplot(pos_data_long_filtered, aes(x = position, fill = position_type)) +
  geom_histogram(alpha = 0.6, bins = 100, position = "identity") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("pos1" = "steelblue", "pos2" = "salmon"),
                    labels = c("pos1", "pos2"),
                    name = "Position Type") +
  labs(title = "Distribution of pos1 and pos2 Values (Filtered Dataset)",
       subtitle = "Filtered to remove max2 > 0.8",
       x = "Position (nucleotides from sequence start)",
       y = "Frequency",
       caption = paste("Total data points:", nrow(pos_data_long_filtered))) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.position = "right") +
  # Add vertical line at position 50 (expected canonical splice site)
  geom_vline(xintercept = 50, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("text", x = 50, y = Inf, label = "Expected pos1 (~50)", 
           vjust = 1.5, hjust = 0, color = "red", fontface = "bold")

print(p_hist_pos_filtered)

# Summary statistics
cat("\nFiltered Position Summary Statistics:\n")
cat("  pos1 - Mean:", mean(filtered_clean$pos1, na.rm = TRUE), 
    "| Median:", median(filtered_clean$pos1, na.rm = TRUE), 
    "| % < 55:", round(100 * sum(filtered_clean$pos1 < 55, na.rm = TRUE) / nrow(filtered_clean), 2), "%\n")
cat("  pos2 - Mean:", mean(filtered_clean$pos2, na.rm = TRUE), 
    "| Median:", median(filtered_clean$pos2, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
```

```{r filtered-scatterplot-max2-gt-max1}
# Filter for cases where max2 > max1
max2_gt_max1_data_filtered <- filtered_clean %>%
  filter(max2 > max1) %>%
  filter(!is.na(max2) & !is.na(pos2))

cat("\nFiltered Cases where max2 > max1:\n")
cat("  Total cases:", nrow(max2_gt_max1_data_filtered), "\n")
cat("  Percentage of filtered data:", 
    round(100 * nrow(max2_gt_max1_data_filtered) / nrow(filtered_clean), 2), "%\n")

p_scatter_max2_filtered <- ggplot(max2_gt_max1_data_filtered, aes(x = pos2, y = max2)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.5, color = "darkgreen") +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, color = "red", linewidth = 1.5) +
  labs(title = "Scatterplot: max2 vs pos2 (when max2 > max1, Filtered Dataset)",
       subtitle = paste("Filtered to remove max2 > 0.8 (n =", 
                       format(nrow(max2_gt_max1_data_filtered), big.mark = ","), ")"),
       x = "pos2 (position of max2)",
       y = "max2 (SpliceAI score)",
       caption = "Red line shows LOESS smoothing trend") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  # Add reference lines
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.1, linetype = "dashed", color = "blue", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "blue", alpha = 0.5) +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = 0.1, label = "max2 = 0.1", 
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = -0.5, color = "blue", size = 3) +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = 0.5, label = "max2 = 0.5", 
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = -0.5, color = "blue", size = 3)

print(p_scatter_max2_filtered)
```

```{r filtered-density-plots-all-stats}
# Prepare data for density plots
density_data_filtered <- filtered_clean %>%
  select(max1, pos1, max2, pos2) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), 
               names_to = "statistic", 
               values_to = "value") %>%
  filter(!is.na(value))

# Create density plots (NO LOG SCALE)
density_data_pos_filtered <- density_data_filtered %>% filter(statistic %in% c("pos1", "pos2"))
density_data_score_filtered <- density_data_filtered %>% filter(statistic %in% c("max1", "max2"))

p_density_pos_filtered <- ggplot(density_data_pos_filtered, aes(x = value, fill = statistic)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6, linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ statistic, scales = "free", ncol = 2,
             labeller = labeller(statistic = c(
               "pos1" = "pos1 (Position of max1)",
               "pos2" = "pos2 (Position of max2)"
             ))) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "plasma", name = "Statistic") +
  labs(title = "Distribution (Density) of Position Statistics (Filtered Dataset)",
       subtitle = "Filtered max2 > 0.8",
       x = "Value",
       y = "Density") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "none")

p_density_score_filtered <- ggplot(density_data_score_filtered, aes(x = value, fill = statistic)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6, linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ statistic, scales = "free", ncol = 2,
             labeller = labeller(statistic = c(
               "max1" = "max1 (Primary SpliceAI Score)",
               "max2" = "max2 (Secondary SpliceAI Score)"
             ))) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "plasma", name = "Statistic") +
  labs(title = "Distribution (Density) of Score Statistics (Filtered Dataset)",
       subtitle = "Filtered max2 > 0.8",
       x = "Value",
       y = "Density") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "none")

print(p_density_pos_filtered)
print(p_density_score_filtered)

# Summary statistics for each
cat("\nFiltered Summary Statistics by Statistic:\n")
for (stat in c("max1", "pos1", "max2", "pos2")) {
  stat_data <- density_data_filtered %>% filter(statistic == stat)
  cat(sprintf("  %s: Mean = %.3f, Median = %.3f, SD = %.3f, Range = [%.3f, %.3f]\n",
              stat,
              mean(stat_data$value, na.rm = TRUE),
              median(stat_data$value, na.rm = TRUE),
              sd(stat_data$value, na.rm = TRUE),
              min(stat_data$value, na.rm = TRUE),
              max(stat_data$value, na.rm = TRUE)))
}
```

```{r filtered-heatmap-max2}
# Prepare matrix for heatmap: decoy IDs as columns, species as rows
# Extract max2 values for each decoy-species pair
max2_matrix_data_filtered <- filtered_clean %>%
  select(decoyID, species, max2) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = decoyID, values_from = max2)

# Set species as row names and convert to matrix
max2_matrix_filtered <- as.matrix(max2_matrix_data_filtered[, -1])  # Exclude species column
rownames(max2_matrix_filtered) <- max2_matrix_data_filtered$species

# Replace NA with -1 for visualization (missing data)
max2_matrix_filtered[is.na(max2_matrix_filtered)] <- -1

# Reorder rows (species) to match Newick order (reuse from main heatmap section)
available_species_filtered <- rownames(max2_matrix_filtered)
ordered_available_filtered <- intersect(ordered_species_ids, available_species_filtered)
other_species_filtered <- setdiff(available_species_filtered, ordered_available_filtered)
final_species_order_filtered <- c(ordered_available_filtered, other_species_filtered)
max2_matrix_filtered <- max2_matrix_filtered[final_species_order_filtered, , drop = FALSE]

# Map species IDs to common names for row labels (reuse mapping from main heatmap section)
current_rownames_filtered <- rownames(max2_matrix_filtered)
common_names_filtered <- ifelse(current_rownames_filtered %in% names(species_id_to_common),
  species_id_to_common[current_rownames_filtered],
  current_rownames_filtered
)
rownames(max2_matrix_filtered) <- common_names_filtered

cat("\nFiltered Max2 Heatmap Matrix:\n")
cat("  Dimensions:", dim(max2_matrix_filtered), "\n")
cat("  Species (rows):", nrow(max2_matrix_filtered), "\n")
cat("  Decoy IDs (columns):", ncol(max2_matrix_filtered), "\n")
cat("  Value range:", min(max2_matrix_filtered), "to", max(max2_matrix_filtered), "\n")
cat("  -1 values (missing):", sum(max2_matrix_filtered == -1), "\n")

# Create heatmap with species in Newick order (no row clustering)
# Plot full matrix - no sampling
pheatmap(
  max2_matrix_filtered,
  color = color_gradient,
  breaks = c(-1.5, seq(-0.5, 1, length.out = n_colors + 1)),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,  # Keep species in Newick order
  cluster_cols = TRUE,
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  show_colnames = FALSE,  # Too many decoy IDs to show
  main = "Heatmap of max2 (Filtered Dataset: max2 < 0.8) - Species Ordered by Newick Tree",
  fontsize_row = 8,
  fontsize_col = 6,
  border_color = NA,
  na_col = "grey70",
  legend_breaks = c(-1, 0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1),
  legend_labels = c("Missing", "0.0", "0.25", "0.5", "0.75", "1.0")
)
```

```{r filtered-validation-summary}
cat("\n")
cat(paste0(rep("=", 80), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("FILTERED DATASET VALIDATION SUMMARY: Canonical Splice Site Detection\n")
cat(paste0(rep("=", 80), collapse = ""), "\n\n")

# Key metrics
total_valid_filtered <- nrow(filtered_clean)
pos1_near_50_filtered <- sum(filtered_clean$pos1 >= 40 & filtered_clean$pos1 <= 60, na.rm = TRUE)
pos1_lt_55_filtered <- sum(filtered_clean$pos1 < 55, na.rm = TRUE)
max1_high_filtered <- sum(filtered_clean$max1 > 0.8, na.rm = TRUE)
max2_gt_max1_filtered <- sum(filtered_clean$max2 > filtered_clean$max1, na.rm = TRUE)

cat("Key Validation Metrics (Filtered Dataset):\n")
cat(sprintf("  1. pos1 in expected range (40-60 nt): %d (%.2f%%)\n", 
            pos1_near_50_filtered, 100 * pos1_near_50_filtered / total_valid_filtered))
cat(sprintf("  2. pos1 < 55 nt: %d (%.2f%%)\n", 
            pos1_lt_55_filtered, 100 * pos1_lt_55_filtered / total_valid_filtered))
cat(sprintf("  3. max1 > 0.8 (high confidence): %d (%.2f%%)\n", 
            max1_high_filtered, 100 * max1_high_filtered / total_valid_filtered))
cat(sprintf("  4. max2 > max1 (secondary site stronger): %d (%.2f%%)\n", 
            max2_gt_max1_filtered, 100 * max2_gt_max1_filtered / total_valid_filtered))
cat(sprintf("  5. Mean pos1: %.2f nt (expected ~50 nt)\n", 
            mean(filtered_clean$pos1, na.rm = TRUE)))
cat(sprintf("  6. Median pos1: %.2f nt\n", 
            median(filtered_clean$pos1, na.rm = TRUE)))

cat("\nInterpretation:\n")
if (mean(filtered_clean$pos1, na.rm = TRUE) > 40 && mean(filtered_clean$pos1, na.rm = TRUE) < 60) {
  cat("  ✓ Mean pos1 is in expected range (40-60 nt) - GOOD\n")
} else {
  cat("  ⚠ Mean pos1 is outside expected range - may indicate issues with large insertions\n")
}

if (100 * pos1_lt_55_filtered / total_valid_filtered > 80) {
  cat("  ✓ >80% of pos1 values are < 55 nt - GOOD\n")
} else {
  cat("  ⚠ <80% of pos1 values are < 55 nt - may indicate detection issues\n")
}

cat("\n", paste0(rep("=", 80), collapse = ""), "\n")
```
